browserRuntime.provider: npm run dev, in-app browser, server terminal log
browserRuntime.command: npm run dev; in-app browser opened http://localhost:3000/
browserRuntime.summary: Dev server reported Ready on localhost:3000. Browser loaded title FC moim, glass CSS variables were present, and there were 0 console error logs. Approved-member Home glass cards are covered by deterministic UI tests because the browser session was in guest state.

retrospective.issuesObserved: In-app browser was in guest state, so approved-member Home dashboard cards were not visible for direct browser DOM inspection.
retrospective.missedEvidence: Manual light/dark visual contrast inspection on a real mobile device was not run in this turn.
retrospective.harnessImprovementProposal: Consider adding a deterministic visual fixture or authenticated browser seed for approved-member Home dashboard states.
retrospective.reason: The Home glass card treatment is PRD-specific UI styling; no durable harness policy promotion is needed.
